prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances ŌĆö either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large gray metal cube
  - obj_1: small green metal cube
  - obj_2: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: large yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_5: large blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large green metal cylinder
  - obj_7: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_8: small blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small cyan metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0201] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0202] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0203] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0204] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0205] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0206] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0207] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0208] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0209] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0210] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0211] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0212] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0213] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0214] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0215] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0216] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0217] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0218] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0219] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0220] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and compare distances between pairs of objects.

Let me estimate the positions of each object based on the image:

- obj_0 (large gray metal cube): right side, middle area (~6, 0, -1)
- obj_1 (small green metal cube): center-right area (~4, 0, -1)
- obj_2 (small cyan rubber cylinder): left-back area (~-3, 0, -3)
- obj_3 (large yellow rubber sphere): right area (~5, 0, -2)
- obj_4 (small green rubber sphere): back area (~-2, 0, -5)
- obj_5 (large blue rubber cylinder): center-right area (~3, 0, -3)
- obj_6 (large green metal cylinder): center-front area (~1, 0, 0)
- obj_7 (large brown metal cylinder): front area (~2, 0, 2)
- obj_8 (small blue rubber cylinder): back-left area (~-2, 0, -4)
- obj_9 (small cyan metal cube): left area (~-5, 0, -1)

Now let me calculate approximate distances:

obj_0 to obj_8: sqrt((6-(-2))^2 + (0-(-4))^2) = sqrt(64+16) = sqrt(80) Ōēł 8.9

For each question:

[qrr_0201] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_5: obj_4-obj_5: sqrt(((-2)-3)^2+((-5)-(-3))^2)=sqrt(25+4)Ōēł5.4. 8.9>5.4 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0202] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_7: sqrt(((-2)-2)^2+((-5)-2)^2)=sqrt(16+49)Ōēł8.1. 8.9>8.1 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0203] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_9: sqrt(((-2)-(-5))^2+((-5)-(-1))^2)=sqrt(9+16)=5. 8.9>5 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0204] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_5-obj_6: sqrt((3-1)^2+((-3)-0)^2)=sqrt(4+9)Ōēł3.6. 8.9>3.6 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0205] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_5-obj_7: sqrt((3-2)^2+((-3)-2)^2)=sqrt(1+25)Ōēł5.1. 8.9>5.1 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0206] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_5-obj_9: sqrt((3-(-5))^2+((-3)-(-1))^2)=sqrt(64+4)Ōēł8.2. 8.9>8.2 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0207] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_6-obj_7: sqrt((1-2)^2+(0-2)^2)=sqrt(1+4)Ōēł2.2. 8.9>2.2 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0208] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_6-obj_9: sqrt((1-(-5))^2+(0-(-1))^2)=sqrt(36+1)Ōēł6.1. 8.9>6.1 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0209] obj_0-obj_8 vs obj_7-obj_9: sqrt((2-(-5))^2+(2-(-1))^2)=sqrt(49+9)Ōēł7.6. 8.9>7.6 ŌåÆ ">"

obj_0 to obj_9: sqrt((6-(-5))^2+((-1)-(-1))^2)=sqrt(121)=11

[qrr_0210] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_1-obj_2: sqrt((4-(-3))^2+((-1)-(-3))^2)=sqrt(49+4)Ōēł7.3. 11>7.3 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0211] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_1-obj_3: sqrt((4-5)^2+((-1)-(-2))^2)=sqrt(1+1)Ōēł1.4. 11>1.4 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0212] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_1-obj_4: sqrt((4-(-2))^2+((-1)-(-5))^2)=sqrt(36+16)Ōēł7.2. 11>7.2 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0213] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_1-obj_5: sqrt((4-3)^2+((-1)-(-3))^2)=sqrt(1+4)Ōēł2.2. 11>2.2 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0214] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_1-obj_6: sqrt((4-1)^2+((-1)-0)^2)=sqrt(9+1)Ōēł3.2. 11>3.2 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0215] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_1-obj_7: sqrt((4-2)^2+((-1)-2)^2)=sqrt(4+9)Ōēł3.6. 11>3.6 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0216] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_1-obj_8: sqrt((4-(-2))^2+((-1)-(-4))^2)=sqrt(36+9)Ōēł6.7. 11>6.7 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0217] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_2-obj_3: sqrt(((-3)-5)^2+((-3)-(-2))^2)=sqrt(64+1)Ōēł8.1. 11>8.1 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0218] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_2-obj_4: sqrt(((-3)-(-2))^2+((-3)-(-5))^2)=sqrt(1+4)Ōēł2.2. 11>2.2 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0219] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_2-obj_5: sqrt(((-3)-3)^2+((-3)-(-3))^2)=sqrt(36)=6. 11>6 ŌåÆ ">"
[qrr_0220] obj_0-obj_9(11) vs obj_2-obj_6: sqrt(((-3)-1)^2+((-3)-0)^2)=sqrt(16+9)=5. 11>5 ŌåÆ ">"
